TextView.android:text:
🔍 You can search any food freely!

Tips:
• More specific = better results
• Try adding type (e.g. grilled, cooked)

⚖️ Quantity Guide:
• All values are based on 100 grams (default)
• 100g = exact calories shown
• 200g = double calories
• 50g = half calories

📦 Using Pieces (pcs):
• You can enter 1 pc, 2 pcs, etc.
• The app estimates weight automatically
• Example: 1 egg ≈ 50g
• Results are slightly estimated but useful

🔥 Tap 'Add' to save food into your daily log

📊 Calories and macros update automatically in your dashboard
